ns0:entry.ns0:title: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
Language: go
CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MHSanaei/3x-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
Language: go
Xray panel supporting multi-protocol multi-user expire day & traffic & IP limit (Vmess, Vless, Trojan, ShadowSocks, Wireguard, Hysteria, Tunnel, Mixed, HTTP, Tun)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

URL: https://github.com/akuity/kargo
Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytebase/bytebase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytebase/bytebase
Language: go
World's most advanced database DevSecOps solution for Developer, Security, DBA and Platform Engineering teams. The GitHub/GitLab for database DevSecOps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg
Language: go
CloudNativePG is a comprehensive platform designed to seamlessly manage PostgreSQL databases within Kubernetes environments, covering the entire operational lifecycle from initial deployment to ongoing maintenance

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coreybutler/nvm-windows
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coreybutler/nvm-windows
Language: go
A node.js version management utility for Windows. Ironically written in Go.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
Language: go
DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: infiniflow/ragflow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/infiniflow/ragflow
Language: go
RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs
